name: llm-language
description: Self-evolving prompt meta-compiler with Jarvis proactive mode, mandatory codebase awareness, CLAUDE.md auto-maintenance, and ROSETTA.md persistent memory. v3.2: /llm-language:jarvis (3-phase proactive assistant — observe, anticipate, act), /llm-language:update (self-evolution research), Phase 0.6 CLAUDE.md maintenance, 8 scoring dimensions, threshold 9.2.
